msgs: Hey, I made a little surprise for you.
It is not perfect, but every part of it was made with love.
I wanted to say this properly
I wanted to say this in a way you could keep.
First: you make ordinary days feel special.
And yes, this message can switch sides too.
author: me

msgs: Some words deserve a little color.
You are my favorite person.
Before I continue, type yes if you want to hear something sweet.

rejectHitTexts: I am going to continue anyway, because this is important.

msgs: You are kind, funny, beautiful, and somehow still patient with me.
Here is a tiny memory placeholder.
I also added a small video section.
Open it when you are ready.
<vlog src='options/demo/vlogs/test.mp4'/>
And now, a letter.
This part has the things I wanted to say slowly.
<letter src='options/demo/letters/test.json'/>
Can I tell you one more thing?

rejectHitTexts: I promise it is a good thing.
Too late, I am saying it anyway.

msgs: I am really grateful for you.
Guess what I am thinking about.
I was thinking about you.
Obviously, I was thinking about you.
Thank you for being in my life.
That is the end of this little surprise.
